Do not expose API keys, database URLs, or secrets via NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefixed variables
Do not hardcode environment-specific values (URLs, ports, feature flags) directly in source code
Do not use 'any' type for variables; prefer 'unknown' and narrow with type guards
Do not mutate state variables directly; always use setter functions or state management actions
Do not store derived data in state; compute it during render or use useMemo
Do not commit .env.local or .env.*.local files to version control
Do not reference server-only environment variables in Client Components; they will be undefined
Do not use var; always prefer const or let with block scoping
